changelog:
* **fix: webview app page loading** (7651cdd)
  - Replace rigid URL prefix matching with domain host checking in shouldOverrideUrlLoading
  - Enable Web Database storage (databaseEnabled) for IndexedDB support in Vite app
  - Strip ; wv token from user agent string to prevent Cloudflare/Vercel blocks
  - Ignore non-fatal request cancellation errors in onReceivedError
  - Add SSL error handler fallback
